rights_boundary: visual layout and agency program branding not needed for retained prose
reason: all visual branding and page trade dress excluded

rights_boundary: incorporated or summarized standards text and exact identifiers are separately authored
reason: all quotations, requirements, titles, identifiers, classifications and standard-derived text excluded

rights_boundary: third-party organization names, program name and certification language
reason: program title, organization marks, quoted language and certification details excluded; only the FHWA governance lesson that trained installation matters is paraphrased

rights_boundary: product-class wording and operational installation parameters
reason: every product class, material detail, manufacturer-instruction reference and installation step excluded

rights_boundary: standards-dependent design, qualification, inspection, testing, retrofit and replacement prescriptions
reason: exact requirements, alternatives, procedures and criteria excluded; only qualified owner-process governance retained

rights_boundary: schematic authorship and embedded structural example not relied on
reason: entire drawing, force path, labels, notation, geometry and image-derived claims excluded

rights_boundary: exact loads, force classes, materials, durations, examples and mechanics
reason: all enumerated scenarios, calculations, material descriptions, durations and operational classifications excluded

rights_boundary: table explicitly reproduces classifications from a third-party standard
reason: entire table, headings, abbreviations, entries, continuation and table-derived claims excluded
